text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the morning of New Year's Day, I receive an
unexpected message from Seiun Sky asking me to
come on her first shrine visit of the year.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh, there you are. Happy New Year!
choice_data_list: What's up with the sudden invite?
What's up with the sudden invite?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: "What's up"? That's a little rude, don'tcha think?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
What's wrong with a racer inviting her trainer to a
shrine so they can pray for a successful year?
choice_data_list: Sure, that might convince me if you were a normal racer, but...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Are you saying I'm not normal? You are being rude!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, I was just thinking we should use every
tool we can get our hands on, including
prayers—that's all!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...That's what I mean. We're gonna have to use
our heads, otherwise I won't make it through my
senior year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky faced off against some powerful
opponents in both the Classics and the Arima
Kinen. I can assume she's been brewing up lots of
different ideas.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: What should I pray for?
choice_data_list: Pray that she refrains from overworking herself.
Pray that she achieves great success.
Pray that she can enjoy her races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A runner's body is an important asset. I pray that
Seiun Sky will be able to keep on challenging
herself without getting hurt in the process.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her true strength will matter more than ever this
year. I pray that Seiun Sky will be able to make
the most of her talents.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I pray that Seiun Sky will be able to truly enjoy
racing this year, just like she did last year.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Okay. It's up to the gods now.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That's a secret. If I tell you, it won't come true,
duh.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But... I'm pretty sure we both wished for the same
thing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of us then make our way back to campus
while having a lighthearted discussion about the
year ahead, when...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hm? Is that...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh, Sei! Good morning!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's Special Week. She announced the other day
that she would be racing in the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Morning. Getting in some solo training? You're
sure not wasting any time this year.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yep! That's 'cause I don't wanna lose to you this
year!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I saw you at the Arima Kinen. You were amazing!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You must have been under so much pressure, but
you overcame it and ran exactly how you wanted
to.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I got chills watching! So I've really gotta get
better too!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I wanna beat you in the spring Tenno Sho. Once I
do that... I'll be one step closer to being number
one in Japan!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week's goals immediately clash with
those of Seiun Sky.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Well, thanks, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Good luck with your training. Let's get going,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Huh? What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I don't wanna get in the way of her training. We
can always chat more at the academy.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Plus, you heard her. She said she's gotta get
better.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
She watched the Arima Kinen, so she must have
felt how driven everyone was.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: But I'm...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I'm... hungry.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Looking at Spe's face makes me hungry, y'know?
Since she's always snacking on something.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I think I'm gonna go grab a bite from the dorm
kitchen.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: See ya later. Here's to another year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Did Seiun Sky pick up on something I didn't? I
can't tell right now, but I know I'll continue to
look out for her and be a source of strength
whenever she needs me.
